item.title: South Africa’s 30 June protests leave hundreds arrested as tensions spread nationwide
item.description: A wave of anti-migrant protests swept across South Africa this week amid the 30 June deadline, leading to more than 900 arrests nationwide as tensions over illegal immigration once again spilled onto the streets, Cape {town} Etc reports. While most marches remained peaceful, authorities confirmed that several areas experienced outbreaks of looting, public violence and attacks on foreign-owned businesses, raising fears...
